content:
Introducing Siri AI. Truly helpful. Truly yours.

New Apple Intelligence features coming this fall. Siri AI coming in English later this year.

Introducing the next generation of Apple Intelligence and Siri. Truly helpful AI that’s centered around you and your needs. Integrated into your apps, grounded in your context, and private at every step. Coming later this year.

New Siri AI. An even more capable AI assistant with expanded intelligence to be more helpful every day. 1

Type or talk naturally with Siri AI to find what you need and get more done.

Next-generation Apple Intelligence enhances the apps you use most — like Photos, Messages, and Safari. 2

Search and take action with Visual Intelligence, now on even more devices — iPad, Mac, and Apple Vision Pro. 3

Transform your photos with easy-to-use AI editing tools like Spatial Reframing, Extend, and Clean Up.

Write with Siri virtually anywhere you type — compose, edit, and send messages.

Powered by Apple Intelligence, Siri AI is your conversational AI assistant with entirely new capabilities. Ask open-ended questions, brainstorm ideas for work or creative projects, and engage in natural, back-and-forth conversations.

Siri understands your personal context.

Siri AI can find relevant answers to what you’re looking for just by asking. Search for a photo from years ago, easily locate an email buried in your inbox, or pull up the details from a note you saved.

Siri AI can take actions in apps like Messages, Music, Reminders, and more based on what you’re doing in the moment. Quickly edit a message you just sent or add a song you hear in the car to your workout playlist.

Ask about virtually any topic that’s on your mind, from important facts to recipes and travel recommendations. Siri AI can reference information online to give you detailed, up-to-date insights.

A dedicated app brings together all your conversations in one place, so you can ask a question on your iPhone and pick up where you left off on your iPad. You can also pin conversations for easy access or start a new one.

Pick a voice, then customize expressivity and pace until it clicks for you. 4

On the road, ask Siri which trailhead your friend suggested and get the answer instantly. Siri in CarPlay keeps you informed without taking your hands off the wheel. 5

Siri mode and Visual Intelligence let you search, ask questions, and take action based on what’s around you with just a tap.

Visual Intelligence makes it easy to split the bill with friends when you get the check, get nutritional information on a dish in front of you, quickly import a card to Apple Wallet, and more.

Ask Siri about what’s in front of you.

Get information, take action, and search visually using the content on your screen.

Visual Intelligence with Siri on Mac.

Take a screenshot of what’s on your display, like an image or a PDF, and Visual Intelligence lets you search and take action.

Visual Intelligence with Siri on iPad.

Ask Siri AI about virtually anything on your display with a screenshot. Just tap the item with your finger or circle it with Apple Pencil to find out more.

Visual Intelligence with Siri on Apple Vision Pro.

Simply look at something to learn more about it. You can ask Siri AI about text, images, and even real-world objects as you see them in the moment.

Next-level intelligent photo editing.

Reframe a photo after it’s been taken with Spatial Reframing. Expand your shots with the Extend tool. And remove even larger objects with the enhanced Clean Up tool.

Reframe your photo even after it’s taken.

Move the viewpoint, adjust the angle, or zoom in as if you were repositioning the camera in the moment with Spatial Reframing.

Express more with Image Playground.

Create unique, high-quality images in just about any style, including photorealistic. Modify and transform your images with just a description or using touch for endless possibilities.

Transform rough sketches into images in virtually any style right in Notes.

Write with Siri virtually anywhere you type.

Siri AI can now generate a draft from scratch or provide feedback on what you’ve written. Just describe what you need in your own words. And in Messages and Mail, Siri AI can match your writing style, punctuation, and tone.

Messages and Mail offer suggestions to help you take quick actions based on context from your conversation — add a calendar event or search for a photo with just a tap.

Apple Intelligence automatically checks your grammar and spelling and offers suggestions virtually anywhere you type.

Get relevant information while on a call.

Call Context can proactively surface relevant information from across apps when you’re calling a business — like a confirmation code from Mail when you call an airline.

Turn on Live Translation to automatically translate texts in Messages, display live translated captions in FaceTime, and get spoken translations for calls in the Phone app and conversations on your AirPods.

Now your tabs can be automatically grouped into topics, so related pages are easier to find. Safari Notify Me monitors pages for changes — for example, a price change or restock — and alerts you when it’s time to act. And you can create an extension that personalizes website content and formatting or automates common Safari actions.

The Passwords app alerts you to weak or compromised passwords and can update them on your behalf without the hassle.

Automate daily tasks with a simple description. Just describe what you need, and Shortcuts creates an automation that connects actions across apps.

A powerful new on-device model allows Dictation to understand you even better as you speak. 6

Add and edit events on your calendar with just a description. Change a lunch meeting to a cof
chineseContent:
介绍 Siri 人工智能。确实有帮助。真正属于您的。

新的 Apple Intelligence 功能将于今年秋季推出。 Siri AI 今年晚些时候将推出英文版。

隆重推出下一代 Apple Intelligence 和 Siri。以您和您的需求为中心的真正有用的人工智能。集成到您的应用程序中，立足于您的环境，并且每一步都是私密的。今年晚些时候即将推出。

新的 Siri 人工智能。功能更强大的人工智能助手，具有扩展的智能，每天都能提供更多帮助。 1

使用 Siri AI 自然地打字或交谈，找到您需要的内容并完成更多工作。

下一代 Apple Intelligence 增强了您最常使用的应用程序，例如照片、消息和 Safari。 2

现在可以在更多设备上使用 Visual Intelligence 进行搜索并采取行动 - iPad、Mac 和 Apple Vision Pro。 3

使用空间重构、扩展和清理等易于使用的 AI 编辑工具来改造您的照片。

几乎可以在任何地方使用 Siri 进行书写——撰写、编辑和发送消息。

Siri AI 由 Apple Intelligence 提供支持，是具有全新功能的对话式 AI 助手。提出开放式问题，集思广益，讨论工作或创意项目的想法，并进行自然的、来回的对话。

Siri 了解您的个人背景。

只需询问，Siri AI 即可找到您所寻找内容的相关答案。搜索多年前的照片，轻松找到收件箱中埋藏的电子邮件，或者从您保存的笔记中提取详细信息。

Siri AI 可以根据您当前正在做的事情在消息、音乐、提醒等应用中采取操作。快速编辑您刚刚发送的消息或将您在车中听到的歌曲添加到锻炼播放列表中。

几乎可以询问您想到的任何话题，从重要事实到食谱和旅行建议。 Siri AI 可以在线参考信息，为您提供详细的最新见解。

专用应用程序将您的所有对话汇集到一个地方，因此您可以在 iPhone 上提出问题，并在 iPad 上从上次中断的地方继续。您还可以固定对话以便于访问或开始新对话。

选择一个声音，然后自定义表现力和节奏，直到适合您为止。 4

在路上，询问 Siri 您的朋友建议的路线起点，并立即获得答案。 CarPlay 中的 Siri 让您无需将双手从方向盘上移开即可了解情况。 5

Siri 模式和视觉智能让您只需轻按一下即可根据周围的情况进行搜索、提出问题并采取行动。

Visual Intelligence 可让您在收到支票时轻松与朋友分摊账单、获取面前菜肴的营养信息、快速将卡导入 Apple 钱包等。

向 Siri 询问您面前的情况。

使用屏幕上的内容获取信息、采取行动并进行直观搜索。

Mac 上通过 Siri 实现视觉智能。

对显示屏上的内容（例如图像或 PDF）进行屏幕截图，视觉智能可让您搜索并采取行动。

iPad 上通过 Siri 实现视觉智能。

通过屏幕截图向 Siri AI 询问显示屏上几乎所有内容。只需用手指点按该项目或用 Apple Pencil 圈出该项目即可了解更多信息。

Apple Vision Pro 上的 Siri 视觉智能。

只需查看一些内容即可了解更多信息。您可以向 Siri AI 询问有关文本、图像，甚至是您当前看到的现实世界物体的信息。

更高水平的智能照片编辑。

使用空间重构功能拍摄照片后重新构图。使用扩展工具扩展您的镜头。并使用增强的清理工具删除更大的物体。

即使在拍摄后也可以重新构图。

移动视点、调整角度或放大，就好像您正在使用空间重构重新定位相机一样。

使用 Image Playground 表达更多内容。

创建几乎任何风格的独特、高质量图像，包括逼真的图像。只需一个描述或使用触摸即可修改和转换您的图像，以获得无限的可能性。

直接在 Notes 中将粗略草图转换为几乎任何风格的图像。

几乎可以在任何地方使用 Siri 进行书写。

Siri AI 现在可以从头开始生成草稿或针对您所写的内容提供反馈。只需用自己的话描述您需要什么即可。在消息和邮件中，Siri AI 可以匹配您的写作风格、标点符号和语气。

“消息”和“邮件”提供建议，帮助您根据对话上下文快速采取行动 - 添加日历活动或只需轻按一下即可搜索照片。

Apple Intelligence 会自动检查您的语法和拼写，并几乎在您键入的任何位置提供建议。

在通话时获取相关信息。

当您致电企业时，通话上下文可以主动显示跨应用程序的相关信息，例如当您致电航空公司时，邮件中的确认码。

开启实时翻译可自动翻译“信息”中的文本、在 FaceTime 中显示实时翻译的字幕，以及在“电话”应用中获取通话翻译以及 AirPods 上的对话的口语翻译。

现在，您的选项卡可以自动分组为主题，因此更容易找到相关页面。 Safari 通知我会监控页面的变化（例如价格变化或补货），并在需要采取行动时提醒您。您还可以创建一个扩展来个性化网站内容和格式或自动执行常见的 Safari 操作。

密码应用会提醒您密码较弱或受到威胁，并可以轻松地代表您更新它们。

通过简单的描述自动执行日常任务。只需描述您的需求，“快捷方式”就会创建一个自动化功能，将跨应用程序的操作连接起来。

强大的新设备模型使听写功能能够在您说话时更好地理解您的意思。 6

在日历上添加和编辑事件，仅包含说明。将午餐会议改为咖啡会议
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于 AI 与科技趋势信号，适合用于观察工具选型、产品机会、开发者关注点和技术路线变化。
